The '''crashed merchant vessel''' was the remains of an [[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI bulk transport]] merchant starship that had crashed on [[Blenjeel]], after being [[Attack on the merchant ship|shot down]] by an Imperial [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] in 14 ABY. All of its crewmembers were either devoured by [[Sand burrower|native sand burrowers]] or killed during the crash. [[Jaden Korr]], who was [[Mission to Blenjeel|sent]] to rescue them, but had been forced to crash-land as well, successfully scavenged the merchant vessel for parts that could be used to repair Korr's own ship. These parts were a [[Power converter/Legends|power converter]], an [[Energy cell/Legends|energy cell]] for the [[Cooling unit/Legends|cooling unit]], a [[Power coupling/Legends|power coupling]] for the [[Acceleration compensator/Legends|acceleration compensator]], and a [[Alluvial damper/Legends|damper]].<ref name="JK:JA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
